title: Permanent solutions to temporary problems
summary: Depression fucking sucks. It sucks to suffer from it; it sucks to see others suffer from it. I lost contact with my landlord sometime last year, and obviously as a private tenant that raised some concerns as my main point of contact for my flat had vanished off the face of the ea
